title: goldi | See your dream job
summary: I partnered with goldi to define their brand strategy and bring the first video-based job search app to market, cutting through a category dominated by bland form fields and bad cover letters.
body: The pitch was simple: no one is best represented by a two-page resume submitted to an algorithm. Goldi is the first video-based job search app, and we used that point of difference to put a stake in the ground for bringing humanity back to a category dominated by form fields and stock photography. The brand promise we landed on connected the groundbreaking tech to an emotional statement, giving the launch a real point of view rather than a feature list.

From there we partnered with Buck to create a film that told the goldi story end to end, supported by a New York City out-of-home rollout and an ongoing social content engine that kept the launch alive past day one.
Allbriton Robbins - Brand strategy and creative direction
